summary: Frontend-only Playwright test of new /evals filter bar (EvalFilterBar + EvalRuns integration). Mocked listEvalJobs / stats / groups-jobs / aggregate with 4 fixture jobs across 3 groups (batch-alpha-001, batch-beta-002, batch-gamma-003) to exercise every filter dimension end-to-end. All 11 scripted assertions passed.

issues: React warning: 'Collapsible is changing from uncontrolled to controlled'. Fires when expandedGroups[groupId] first flips to true (undefined → true). Cosmetic only but should be fixed by initialising open={!!expandedGroups[group.groupId]} (already correct since !!undefined===false) or by seeding expandedGroups with explicit false values. Low priority.

action_items: (optional, low priority) silence Radix Collapsible controlled/uncontrolled warning by coercing `open` to a boolean on first render (e.g. open={Boolean(expandedGroups[group.groupId])}).
critical_code_review_comments: buildJobFilter correctly treats each filled-in field as an INDEPENDENT predicate and combines via AND/OR based on filters.mode — verified in UI with agent=full_stack + prompt=login_fix (AND → empty, OR → alpha+beta).
Date range is inclusive with from=00:00 and to=23:59 (validated: range 2026-04-21..2026-04-23 correctly isolates the 2026-04-22 job in batch-beta-002).

getGroupJobs() applies the same predicate to fetched per-group detail jobs → expanded view stays consistent with top-level filter (validated: with prompt=auth_fix, alpha-001 shows only the auth_fix row, not the hello_world row).
Empty-state copy branches correctly on jobs.length (shows 'No eval runs match the current filters' when filters are active, 'No eval runs found' otherwise).
Active chips render only for set filters; X on an individual chip clears just that filter; filter-reset-btn clears all.
Status stat cards remain independent of the new filter bar (clicking stat-card-failed re-fetches with status=failed without touching `filters` state).
seed_data_creation: No DB seeding — harness-eval jobs for the test user are empty in this preview, so jobs/stats/groups/aggregate endpoints were mocked via Playwright route-interception with 4 synthetic jobs across 3 groups. This is the pattern explicitly allowed by the review_request's agent_to_agent_context_note.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /evals page now hosts a client-side EvalFilterBar (batch / agent / prompt / date-range + AND|OR toggle + chips + reset). Filters are applied both to the flat jobs list (feeds the groups memo) and to the per-group expanded job rows. Pagination and status stat cards are untouched. For future tests that need harness data, either seed via POST /api/eval/jobs (submitEvalJobs) or reuse the Playwright route mock pattern in the iteration 20 test script.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature-addition testing only, no bugs found.
